description_long: This is a military tank with a robust, angular hull and a rotating turret equipped with a long-barreled cannon. The exterior is painted in a weathered olive drab, featuring visible wear, rust, and dirt, suggesting extensive use. The tank has wide, heavy-duty tracks on both sides for traversing rough terrain, and several hatches and storage compartments are visible on the turret and hull. Prominent features include a star insignia on the sides and front, a radio antenna, and various external equipment such as a storage box and spare parts. The front is reinforced with thick armor and a set of vertical metal prongs, likely for clearing obstacles. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing protection, firepower, and mobility in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A heavily armored military tank with a rotating turret, long cannon, and wide tracks, painted in weathered olive drab with star insignia and external equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick frontal armor, vertical prongs, and the main cannon extending from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the star insignia, side storage compartments, and the full length of the tracks and cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, rear hatch, and the star insignia on the hull, with the turret and cannon angled away.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring additional storage, a red canister, the star insignia, and the turret with its cannon pointed forward.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret, centrally positioned; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with visible thick, sloped panels on the front, sides, and turret; reinforced frontal armor and turret ring.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Weathered olive drab paint with dirt and rust patches; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblems on both sides of the hull and front, small white text on the turret, and a unit number on the side.
